title: Ability to separate views into groups
excerpt:
We have a large board with a number of views. It would be nice to group the views together similar to the way that folders work in the workspace pane. That way it would be easier to: 
Group views by task, team or purpose…

posts.author: AWRO (Amy Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a large board with a number of views. It would be nice to group the views together similar to the way that folders work in the workspace pane. That way it would be easier to:
Group views by task, team or purpose.
